title: calamina themeda
intro: Calmiana themeda, also known as Calotropis gigantea, is a species of flowering plant in the milkweed family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calotropis gigantea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its use should be cautioned due to potential toxicity and side effects.
